Mexico Annual Update
Data Validation

### High Work Hours:

Are your hours and/or employee count entered correctly? The total number of hours reported are considerably *HIGHER* than the average annual hours typically worked by full-time employees.

Please validate that you have entered your correct employee count and/or total hours. If correct, provide a brief explanation for approval (this will be visible to your client connections). Otherwise, please correct your answers.

### Low Work Hours:

Are your hours and/or employee count entered correctly? The total number of hours reported are considerably *LOWER* than the average annual hours typically worked by full-time and part-time employees.

Please validate that you have entered your correct employee count and/or total hours. If correct, provide a brief explanation for approval (this will be visible to your client connections). Otherwise, please correct your answers.
If you have multiple classes, please select the highest class.
Please select the Prima media applicable to your company. This can be found on your Prima de Riesgo issued by the IMSS.

Permanent total disability is the loss of a person's abilities or skills that makes them unable to perform any work for the rest of their life. Article 480 The Federal Labor Law
Please enter the total number of Permanent total disability accidents for the given year.
Permanent partial disability is the reduction of a person’s faculties or abilities to work. Article 479 The Federal Labor Law
Please enter the total number of Permanent partial disability accidents for the given year.
Temporary disability is the loss of faculties or abilities that makes a person partially or totally unable to perform their work for a period of time. Article 478 The Federal Labor Law
Please enter the total number of Temporary disability accidents for the given year.

Occupational disease is any pathological condition resulting from the continued action of a cause that originates in the work or in the environment in which the worker is required to perform their services. Article 475 The Federal Labor Law
Please enter the total number of reportable occupational diseases.
